summary: Verified removal of duplicate blue headers from main pages. All pages now show clean structure: TopNav → SecondaryTabs → Content (no duplicate blue headers). All action buttons visible in top-right corner.

issues: Recharts width/height warnings in console (doesn't affect functionality)
React key warning for duplicate children in ArchivioFattureRicevute.jsx - minor issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: All duplicate blue headers removed from pages. Verified: Riconciliazione (0 'Riconciliazione Unificata'), ArchivioBonifici (0 'Archivio Bonifici Bancari'), Fornitori (0 'Gestione Fornitori'), GestioneAssegni (0 'Gestione Assegni'). All pages show action buttons in top-right corner. TopNav has direct links (not dropdowns) except Altro. Year selector shows 'ANNO' label.

action_buttons_visible.details: All pages show action buttons in top-right corner as expected

topnav_direct_links.details: TopNav has direct links: Dashboard, Fatture (180 badge), Prima Nota, Banca (dot), Fisco, Fornitori, HR. Only 'Altro' has dropdown menu.

year_selector_anno_label.details: Year selector shows 'ANNO' label with year dropdown, 2026 selected
